spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_slash.des: Release a holy blade that applies Guided to targets for 3 seconds.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_rush.desc: Dash along your look direction and slash; immune to fall damage until you land.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_shield.de: After learning and inscribing it on a spellbook, raise your shield using vanilla blocking to project a magical barrier; lowering the shield dismisses it and lets it recover. If it breaks, it is disabled for 5 seconds.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_shield.pa: Holy Shield activates while you block with a shield; it cannot be cast with the spell key.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_shield.re: You must be holding a shield to cast this spell.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.gravitation_st: Hold to charge a gravity field with a Cataclysm void vortex around you that slows you, hardens you, and drags enemies inward. Releasing or reaching full charge launches you forward, dealing bonus magic damage equal to the damage you suffered while charging.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.ender_moonligh: Dash forward and unleash a cut that tears through space; the blade wave deals magic damage. Lower current health increases damage; at or below 50% max health, damage is doubled.
Low HP amp: up to 2× at ≤50% max health
Enter a heightened state. When you would take fatal damage, negate it, gain Resistance V for 3 seconds and Heartstop for 2 seconds (applied shortly after), then teleport randomly after the invulnerability window.
Lasts until a fatal hit or 1 hour
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.gravitational_: Select a ground area (purple ring); horizontal aim beyond 32 blocks snaps to 32. After channeling, brief antigravity then spell gravity, teleport above the center and slam. If you stand in this mod's Gravity Cage, non-allied creatures inside are pulled with you and get the same air sequence (only you trigger the landing slam). On landing, damages non-allies, applies gravity and slowness, kicks up blocks.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.gravity_cage.d: Creates a purple Iron's Spellbooks target-area ring (radius 5) around you for 3 seconds; it follows you. Non-allied mobs touching the inner boundary are nudged inward; dripping obsidian tear particles fill the volume.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.detonate.desc: Damages burning enemies within range based on their remaining fire duration, extinguishes them, and applies Bad Luck III for 5 seconds; grants Regeneration equal to spell level for 5 seconds and Luck VI for 1 second.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.detonate.info_: Damage: 0.15 × remaining fire ticks × spell level (in_fire)
Tremble the ground, igniting and knocking back nearby entities.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.cinderous_step: Dash forward a short distance and briefly greatly increase casting speed.
2s of rank-10 Spell Chant Reduction (hidden in HUD)
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.summon_blaze.d: Summon five blazes around you; when you cast Flaming Barrage, they each fire a homing ember (5 damage) along your view, in random order over 5 ticks after a 1-tick delay.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.summon_blaze.i: Synergy: extra Flaming Barrage volley from blazes
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.boom_barrage.d: Launch three explosive fireballs (forward, -15deg, +15deg). While Summon Blaze is active, summoned blazes also fire this barrage (10 damage).
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.fire_rise.desc: Launch straight up with a Burning Dash-style burst, then briefly gain Slow Falling.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.fire_shield.de: After learning and inscribing it on a spellbook, raise your shield using vanilla blocking to project an invisible fire barrier; lowering the shield dismisses it and lets it recover. If it breaks, it is disabled for 5 seconds.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.fire_shield.pa: Fire Shield activates while you block with a shield; it cannot be cast with the spell key.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.fire_shield.re: You must be holding a shield to cast this spell.
Lock onto an allied target as the landing area center and channel. When channeling ends, grant Absorption to yourself and allies in the target area, then proceed into the dash phases.
Leap upward and become electronized. While active, you phase and move freely while electricity gathers beneath you; recast or expiry triggers the follow-up stages.
command.heroic_spirit_spell.spellcooldow: Invalid spell slot index (out of range for the current spell wheel)
Set %s slot %s spell cooldown to %s ticks
Reduced cooldown for %s slot %s; %s ticks remaining
That spell has no active cooldown; nothing changed
That spell was not on cooldown
